name: tensorflowimagehelpercd

metadata.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD
metadata.summary: Helper package for TensorFlow IMAGE CNN and DNN and Display image (dummy)

documentation: # TENSORFLOW IMAGE HELPER CNN AND DNN PACKAGE

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramOne.programOne
documentation: Write a program to demonstrate the working of different activation functions like Sigmoid, Tanh, RELU and softmax to train neural network.

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramFour.programFour
documentation:
Design and implement a CNN model (with 4+ layers of convolutions) to classify multi category image datasets. Use the concept of
regularization and dropout while designing the CNN model. Use the Fashion MNIST datasets. Record the Training accuracy and Test accuracy
corresponding to the following architectures:
1. Base Model
2. Model with L1 Regularization
3. Model with L2 Regularization
4. Model with Dropout

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramFive.programFive
documentation:
Design and implement an Image classification model to classify a dataset of images using Deep Feed Forward Neural Network. Record t
accuracy corresponding to the number of epochs. Use the MNIST datasets.

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramSeven.programSeven
documentation: Implement the standard VGG-16 & 19 CNN architecture model to classify multi category image dataset and check the accuracy

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramThree.programThree
documentation:
build a Deep Feed Forward ANN by implementing the Backpropagation algorithm and test the same using appropriate data sets. Use the
number of hidden layers >= 4.

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramSix.programSix
documentation: Implement Bidirectional LSTM for sentimental analysis on movie reviews.

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramTwo.programTwoA
documentation: Design a single unit perceptron for classification of a linearly separable binary dataset without using pre-defined models. Use the Perceptron from sklearn.

functions.name: TensorflowImageHelperCD.cnn.ProgramTwo.programTwoB
documentation: Identify the problem with single unit Perceptron. Classify using Or, And and Xor data and analyze the result.
